# The Giving Green

> The Giving Green (TGG) is a charity pub golf crawl in Soulard, St. Louis. Nine Soulard bars become nine holes of pub golf for one Saturday. Attendees carry a physical scorecard, play games at each hole, compete for the lowest score, and raise money for nine local charities. The Party Fore Good.

## The 2026 Main Event

- Event: The Second Annual Giving Green Charity Pub Golf Crawl
- Date: Saturday, October 3, 2026, 1 to 6 PM Central
- Location: Soulard, St. Louis, Missouri (nine walkable bars)
- Tickets: $45 at https://thegivinggreen.store
- Giving: $15 of every ticket goes directly to the charity the buyer chooses at checkout
- The team shirt is the ticket. Shirt color designates the charity team.
- Ages 21 and over only. Valid ID required.

## The Nine Charity Teams

St. Louis Hero Network, Folds of Honor, St. Louis Children's Hospital, Make-A-Wish Missouri & Kansas, STL Impact Baseball, Young Friends of Kids with Cancer, St. Jude Children's Research Hospital, Stray Rescue of St. Louis, and Gene Slay's Girls & Boys Club of St. Louis.

## Year One Results (2025)

$20,634 raised for nine charity partners. 1.5M+ social impressions. 100% sell-through on every sponsored drink.

## Links

- [Buy Tickets](https://thegivinggreen.store): Choose your charity team and get on the tee sheet
- [Main Site](https://thegivinggreen.org/): Event details, course, charities, and FAQs
- [Pro Shop](https://thegivinggreen.org/pro-shop): Limited edition event headwear
- Contact: admin@thegivinggreen.org
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/thegivinggreen
